news.headline: Heat rally late, use 14-0 run in final moments to pull away and beat 76ers 119-109
news.description: — Tyler Herro scored 30 points, Bam Adebayo finished with 23 points and 16 rebounds, and the Miami Heat used a 14-0 run in the final moments to rally past the Philadelphia 76ers 119-109 on Monday night.

news.headline: Norman Powell scores 18, Heat use balanced attack to down Cavs 120-103 and snap 5-game skid
